item.name: Ullr Horn
item.description: This heavy horn emits a dulcet tone that summons Ullr, the dragon with a love of song.

mount.name: Ullr
mount.action: Summon forth Ullr, a dragon on the hunt for a musical collaboration.
mount.description: Belonging to Ratatoskr's brood, this dragon was searching for a mortal with whom it could weave songs when it chanced to see you in the middle of a hunt. So impressed was it by your prowess, it chose to accompany you on your travels in hopes of witnessing more heroic feats.
mount.tooltip:
Like our esteemed ancestor, I will
fill the skies with beauteous songs!
- Ehll Tou
